decisions.title: Move Durable Work State Outside The Transcript
decisions.description: Persistent tasks are stored separately from the chat so they survive context churn and can be queried independently of the current conversation window.
decisions.alternatives: Keeping the task graph inside messages makes the demo shorter, but it ties durable work state to volatile prompt history.

zh.title: 把持久任务状态移出对话正文
zh.description: 持久任务要放在聊天记录之外，这样才能跨上下文波动保存，并独立于当前窗口查询。

ja.title: 永続タスク状態を会話の外へ出す
ja.description: 永続タスクはチャット本文から切り離して保存し、文脈の揺れに影響されず独立に参照できるようにします。

decisions.title: Keep Session Todos And Persistent Tasks As Separate Concepts
decisions.description: The course now makes a hard distinction: session todos guide the current turn sequence, while tasks represent durable units of work with their own lifecycle.
decisions.alternatives: Merging the two concepts reduces surface area, but it blurs a boundary that matters in real harness design.

zh.title: 明确区分会话 todo 和持久 task
zh.description: 现在课程明确把两者分开：todo 管当前执行顺序，task 管持久工作单元及其生命周期。

ja.title: セッション todo と永続 task を分ける
ja.description: todo は現在の進行順を導き、task は独自のライフサイクルを持つ永続的な作業単位として扱います。
